summary_en: World Holdings (existing 32.91% holder, related party) launches public tender offer for nms Holdings at ¥540/share. Minimum 6,480,800 shares (66.67% post-acquisition stake); no maximum. 30-trading-day period: 1–10 July 2026. Goal: 100% subsidiary status and delisting. nms Board expresses support; shareholders decide independently on tendering.
title_en: Notice of Endorsement and Neutral Opinion Expression Regarding Public Tender Offer for nms Holdings Shares by World Holdings Corporation (Related Party)
translation_en_brief: On 29 May 2026, nms Holdings' board of directors announced its endorsement of a public tender offer launched by World Holdings Corporation for nms ordinary shares. World Holdings, which already owns 6,319,700 shares (32.91% of outstanding stock) and qualifies as a related party, is seeking to acquire full subsidiary status and effect a delisting. The tender offer runs for 30 trading days from 1–10 July 2026 at a fixed price of ¥540 per share. The bidder has set a minimum purchase threshold of 6,480,800 shares (which would result in a 66.67% post-acquisition ownership stake) and has imposed no maximum. The board resolved to express support for the transaction while leaving the decision to tender entirely to the discretion of nms shareholders. The disclosure notes that the board's stance is premised on World Holdings' intention to complete the tender, execute follow-on squeeze-out procedures, and effect delisting.
